title: zephyranthes flammea
intro: Zephyranthes flammea, also known as the Flame Lily or Zephyr Lily, is a flowering plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant is known for its vibrant orange to red flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zephyranthes flammea include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be made from its roots, leaves, and flowers.
